signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY (Up from 2.00% in Feb)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

South Korea's Consumer Price Index reached 118.8 in March 2026, with year-over-year inflation rising to 2.16% from 2.00% the prior month and month-over-month inflation at 0.34%.[1] This exceeds the Bank of Korea's 2% target, consistent with recent reports of inflation around 2.2% ami

signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows ($119
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows ($119.6M), Unseating Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP led digital asset investment products with $119.6M inflows last week (strongest since mid-Dec 2025), ahead of Bitcoin ($107.3M) and Solana ($34.9M), signaling institutional shift and boosting year-to-date XRP inflows to $159M (7% of AUM).[2][3]

signals.headline: Bitcoin Reclaims $87,000 with XRP, Solana, Ethereum Leading Gains | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Reclaims $87,000 with XRP, Solana, Ethereum Leading Gains | YES | MED confidence**  
Bitcoin hit $87,000 in early Tuesday trading (up 1.6% in 24h), driven by XRP, Solana, and ETH gains, though mid-sized holder selling delays full trend reversal confirmation.[6]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Looms (72% Polymarket Odds for XRP Commodity Status) | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Looms (72% Polymarket Odds for XRP Commodity Status) | NO | MED confidence**  
No passage yet; late April markup on CLARITY Act holds 72% odds on Polymarket to classify XRP as a digital commodity, potentially unlocking $4-8B ETF capital if approved.[1][3]
